voices.name: Chaz Cobalt
voices.description: Confident drive-time DJ; warm and a little swaggery.

voices.name: Marlon Midnight
voices.description: Deep and reflective; the voice for a long drive.

voices.name: Lola Lumen
voices.description: Bright and quick-witted; the friend who always has the gossip.

voices.name: Stella Static
voices.description: Cool and a little edgy; pirate-radio cool.

voices.name: Ruby Rebel
voices.description: Bold and punchy; reads the headlines like she means it.

voices.name: Archer Ames
voices.description: Crisp and precise; a polished newsreader who lands every point.

voices.name: Lucy Livermore
voices.description: Bright and personable; turns the day's headlines into easy conversation.
